executives.name: Dambisa Moyo
executives.background: Co-principal of Versaca Investments. Director since 2016.

executives.name: Judy Bruner
executives.background: Judy Bruner was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of SanDisk Corporation from 2004 until its acquisition by Western Digital in 2016.

executives.name: Michael Cannon
executives.background: Mr. Cannon has been a director since 2011. He was President of Global Operations at Dell Inc.
